messages: {"parts":[{"tool_name":"edit_file_llm","args":"{\"target_file\": \"/home/workspace/Skills/pulse/scripts/pulse_plan_validator.py\", \"instructions\": \"Update check_required_sections to also look for inline bold format like **Objective:** not just section headers. The pattern should match either \\\"## Objective\\\" OR \\\"**Objective:**\\\" followed by actual content (not a placeholder).\", \"code_edit\": \"def check_required_sections(content: str) -> list[str]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"Check that required sections exist.\\n    \\n    Looks for both section headers (## Objective) and inline bold format (**Objective:**)\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    missing = []\\n    for section in REQUIRED_SECTIONS:\\n        # Look for markdown headers with the section name\\n        header_pattern = rf'^#+\\\\s*.*{re.escape(section)}.*$'\\n        # Also look for bold inline format: **Objective:** followed by content\\n        inline_pattern = rf'\\\\*\\\\*{re.escape(section)}:\\\\*\\\\*\\\\s*\\\\S'\\n        \\n        has_header = re.search(header_pattern, content, re.MULTILINE | re.IGNORECASE)\\n        has_inline = re.search(inline_pattern, content, re.MULTILINE | re.IGNORECASE)\\n        \\n        if not has_header and not has_inline:\\n            missing.append(section)\\n    return missing\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01UpF7dnmHd4a2XiGDiCj26d","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":93346,"cache_write_tokens":1253,"cache_read_tokens":92092,"output_tokens":393,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":1253,"cache_read_input_tokens":92092,"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":393}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-07T11:22:53.042670Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"74e0a70d-398a-4337-bcab-3e5a3a9d805c","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Architect"},"provider_response_id":"msg_0127GXVStt7qPCgJPCmRxm4f","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"d5206896-97ea-4d50-b238-eec7f628e37b","metadata":null}
